topic: ACL main Contribution 3 clean visual-QA terminology polish

before_text_matches: page 2 line 090: with a clean preservation pilot and a
page 2 line 091: frozen 30-pair target-centered stress set,
defect.reader_effect: The contribution used preservation wording for a pilot branch that the paper otherwise scopes as clean visual-QA evidence below the final gate.

changes.summary: Changed Contribution 3 from clean preservation pilot to clean visual-QA pilot and shortened the backend-separation clause.

rejected_iterations.summary: Direct terminology replacement introduced visible page-2 contribution-column hyphenation: show- / ing, ground- / ing, and sepa- / rate.
The coordinate-behavior rewrite still introduced visible page-2 contribution-column hyphenation: behav- / ior.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 2 shows clean visual-QA pilot and backend differences in answer, point, and coordinate checks without the rejected split regressions.
after_evidence.full_scan_result: The enhanced after scan reports only the existing explicit human-subject wording and normal reference-column hyphenation on pages 9-10.
after_evidence.visual_result: The Contribution 3 block and adjacent Contribution 4/Related Work opener remain visually stable.

claim_boundary: Contribution 3 prose only. No metrics, evidence pools, figures, tables, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: Reference pages retain normal reference-column hyphenation; the existing explicit human-subject wording remains.
